build.beforeDevCommand: mkdir -p dist && cp -r index.html app.js style.css icon.png src-js html2canvas.min.js jspdf.umd.min.js dist/ && npx -y http-server dist -p 1420
build.beforeBuildCommand: mkdir -p dist && cp -r index.html app.js style.css icon.png src-js html2canvas.min.js jspdf.umd.min.js dist/

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'
